issues.detail: Instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage.
Skill is tied to the Dexter framework and may not work with other AI agent platforms.

scenarios.name: generate-tsla-investment-memo
scenarios.rationale: Neither response includes the required ReportGenerator usage, template, sections, format, maxPages, or save/toPDF calls.

scenarios.name: retrieve-aapl-10k
scenarios.rationale: Response B demonstrates the required EdgarClient.getFiling call, outputs riskFactors and financialStatements, and shows the financial tables, whereas Response A only provides a static JSON summary without any code or explicit use of the client.
